h1.visual_description: Not present on this page; typically bold, centered, and larger font size (approx. 14-16pt) in academic paper formats.

h2.visual_description: Not present on this page; typically bold, left-aligned, and slightly larger than body text (approx. 12pt).

visual_matchers.pattern: Italicized text at the end of an entry
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Publication venue, journal name, or conference proceedings (e.g., *arXiv preprint*, *Advances in neural information processing systems*).
Direct URL hyperlink to an external web resource.
Hyperlinked title of a cited work within the reference list.

visual_matchers.pattern: Text block starting with 'Author Name(s). Year.'
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Individual bibliographic entry with a hanging indent.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: No headers, footers, or page numbers are visible on this specific page; clean margins.
